label: Starting mech
description: Adds a starting mechanoid to the colony. Requires the Biotech DLC. The mech may optionally be overseen by a starting colonist.

overseenByPlayerPawnChance.label: Overseen by player pawn chance
overseenByPlayerPawnChance.description: Probability (0-1) that the mech is assigned to a starting colonist as its overseer. Defaults to 0.5.
